description: Phase WX-K.6.b — available TTS providers for the endproduct/audio-voice subtype. Apple Native is the default (free, local). Other providers require user API keys + mchatai.com/cloud compute tokens for paid use.

models.notes: Default. Free, local, no API key needed. Voices match macOS system voices (Ava, Samantha, Daniel, etc.).
High-quality multi-voice TTS. Requires OpenAI API key OR mchatai.com/cloud tokens.
Most expressive (character voices, emotion control). Highest cost but best for podcasts/audiobooks.
Solid quality, good multilingual coverage. Cheapest paid option.
